---
title: "Highlights"
pagetitle: "Highlights — DigiPols"
toc: false
listing:
  contents: highlights
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  date-format: "YYYY · MM · DD"
  categories: true
  feed: true
---

## News, project launches and lab events {style="border-bottom: none;"}

Things happening at the lab - new grants, public talks, software releases, Forum gatherings and select press coverage.

---
